differential_diagnoses: Common variable immunodeficiency (CVID) with associated enteropathy
next_steps: Surgical consultation for possible small bowel resection of ischemic segments
Deep enteroscopy with targeted biopsy of jejunal lesions
Repeat cross-sectional imaging or angiography to evaluate for vascular involvement or pseudoaneurysm formation
Excisional biopsy or resection specimen analysis for T-cell receptor gene rearrangement studies
Review of previous biopsy samples with expert hematopathology consultation to rule out occult lymphoma
Optimization of nutritional status and continuation of intravenous immune globulin replacement
